sentences.target: Tu fiches le câble sous la table.
sentences.reading: /ty fiʃ lə kɑbl su la tabl/

translations.fr: Tu fiches le câble sous la table.
translations.ipa: /ty fiʃ lə kɑbl su la tabl/
translations.en: You stick the cable under the table.
translations.es: Metes el cable debajo de la mesa.
translations.de: Du steckst das Kabel unter den Tisch.
translations.it: Infili il cavo sotto il tavolo.
translations.zh-Hans: 你把电缆塞到桌子下面。
translations.pt: Você coloca o cabo embaixo da mesa.
translations.he: אתה מכניס את הכבל מתחת לשולחן.
translations.vi: Bạn nhét sợi cáp dưới gầm bàn.
translations.nl: Je stopt de kabel onder de tafel.
translations.hu: Bedugod a kábelt az asztal alá.
translations.hi: तुम केबल को मेज़ के नीचे डालते हो.
translations.el: Χώνεις το καλώδιο κάτω από το τραπέζι.
translations.id: Kamu menyelipkan kabel di bawah meja.
translations.da: Du skubber kablet ind under bordet.
translations.ja: テーブルの下にケーブルを押し込む。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; refers to the addressee; serves as the grammatical subject of 'fiches'.
Verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular of 'ficher'; transitive; agrees with 'tu'; takes 'le câble' as direct object; denotes the action of putting/sticking.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'câble' as a specific entity; marks definiteness.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'fiches'; denotes a cable.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase meaning 'under'; governs 'la table'.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'table'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sous'; denotes a table.

sentences.target: On fiche les clés dans ce tiroir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ fiʃ le kle dɑ̃ sə tiʁwaʁ/

translations.fr: On fiche les clés dans ce tiroir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ fiʃ le kle dɑ̃ sə tiʁwaʁ/
translations.en: We put the keys in this drawer.
translations.es: Metemos las llaves en este cajón.
translations.de: Wir legen die Schlüssel in diese Schublade.
translations.it: Mettiamo le chiavi in questo cassetto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把钥匙放在这个抽屉里。
translations.yue: 我哋將啲鎖匙擺喺呢個抽屜入面。
translations.ru: Мы кладём ключи в этот ящик.
translations.pt: Nós colocamos as chaves nesta gaveta.
translations.he: אנחנו שמים את המפתחות במגירה הזאת.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi bỏ chìa khóa vào ngăn kéo này.
translations.nl: We leggen de sleutels in deze la.
translations.uk: Ми кладемо ключі в цю шухляду.
translations.hu: A kulcsokat ebbe a fiókba tesszük.
translations.hi: हम चाबियाँ इस दराज़ में रखते हैं.
translations.el: Βάζουμε τα κλειδιά σε αυτό το συρτάρι.
translations.nb: Vi legger nøklene i denne skuffen.
translations.id: Kami menaruh kunci di laci ini.
translations.sv: Vi lägger nycklarna i den här lådan.
translations.da: Vi lægger nøglerne i denne skuffe.
translations.ja: 鍵をこの引き出しに入れる。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; impersonal/collective 'on' often meaning 'we'; 3rd person singular agreement; subject of 'fiche'.
Verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular of 'ficher'; transitive; selects 'les clés' as direct object; denotes putting.
Definite article, plural; introduces 'clés'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'fiche'; denotes keys.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase meaning 'in/into'; governs 'ce tiroir'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'tiroir'; deictic pointing to a specific drawer.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'; denotes a drawer.

sentences.target: Tu peux ficher la lampe ici.

translations.fr: Tu peux ficher la lampe ici.
translations.en: You can put the lamp here.
translations.de: Du kannst die Lampe hier hinstellen.
translations.pt: Você pode colocar a lâmpada aqui.
translations.he: אתה יכול לשים את המנורה כאן.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể đặt đèn ở đây.
translations.nl: Je kunt de lamp hier neerzetten.
translations.hi: तुम यहाँ लैंप रख सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να βάλεις τη λάμπα εδώ.
translations.id: Kamu bisa menaruh lampu di sini.
translations.ja: ここにランプを置ける。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; refers to the addressee; serves as the grammatical subject of 'peux'.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 2nd person singular; expresses ability/permission; takes the infinitive 'ficher' as its complement.
Verb in the infinitive; lexical main verb complement of 'peux'; transitive; will take 'la lampe' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'lampe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'ficher'; denotes a lamp.
Adverb of place; indicates location; modifies the verb phrase to specify where.

sentences.target: Ils fichent le carton près du mur.
sentences.reading: /il fiʃ lə kaʁtɔ̃ pʁɛ dy myʁ/

translations.fr: Ils fichent le carton près du mur.
translations.ipa: /il fiʃ lə kaʁtɔ̃ pʁɛ dy myʁ/
translations.en: They place the box near the wall.
translations.es: Ponen la caja cerca de la pared.
translations.de: Sie stellen den Karton an die Wand.
translations.it: Mettono la scatola vicino al muro.
translations.yue: 佢哋將個紙箱擺喺牆邊。
translations.pt: Eles colocam a caixa perto da parede.
translations.he: הם שמים את הקופסה ליד הקיר.
translations.vi: Họ đặt thùng gần bức tường.
translations.nl: Ze zetten de doos bij de muur.
translations.hu: A dobozt a fal mellé teszik.
translations.hi: वे डिब्बा दीवार के पास रखते हैं.
translations.el: Βάζουν το κουτί κοντά στον τοίχο.
translations.id: Mereka menaruh kotak di dekat dinding.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed); subject of 'fichent'.
Verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural of 'ficher'; transitive; agrees with 'ils'; takes 'le carton' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces 'carton'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'fichent'; denotes a cardboard box.
Adverb functioning in the fixed expression 'près de' to mean 'near'; forms a complex preposition with 'de/du'.
Contracted form of 'de' + 'le'; here functions as the preposition 'de' combined with the definite article; introduces 'mur' in the PP 'près du mur'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition within 'près du'; denotes a wall.
